'''longaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fmr|fmr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fmr|fmr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| longaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:longarithi|longarithi]] || [[word:longariji|longariji]] || [[word:longarishi|longarishi]] || [[word:longariki|longariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:longaruthuthu|longaruthuthu]] || [[word:longarujuju|longarujuju]] || [[word:longarushushu|longarushushu]] || [[word:longarukuku|longarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:longaruthu|longaruthu]] || [[word:longaruju|longaruju]] || [[word:longarushu|longarushu]] || [[word:longaruku|longaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:longarufthuf|longarufthuf]] || [[word:longarufjuf|longarufjuf]] || [[word:longarufshuf|longarufshuf]] || [[word:longarufkuf|longarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:longarethe|longarethe]] || [[word:longareje|longareje]] || [[word:longareshe|longareshe]] || [[word:longareke|longareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:longarothotho|longarothotho]] || [[word:longarojojo|longarojojo]] || [[word:longaroshosho|longaroshosho]] || [[word:longarokoko|longarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:longarotho|longarotho]] || [[word:longarojo|longarojo]] || [[word:longarosho|longarosho]] || [[word:longaroko|longaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:longarofthof|longarofthof]] || [[word:longarofjof|longarofjof]] || [[word:longarofshof|longarofshof]] || [[word:longarofkof|longarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:longarĂŻfthĂŻf|longarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfjĂŻf|longarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfshĂŻf|longarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfkĂŻf|longarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:longarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|longarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|longarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|longarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|longarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:longarĂŻfthĂŻf|longarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfjĂŻf|longarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfshĂŻf|longarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfkĂŻf|longarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:longarĂŻfthĂŻf|longarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfjĂŻf|longarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfshĂŻf|longarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longarĂŻfkĂŻf|longarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:longarĂŠthĂŠ|longarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:longarĂŠjĂŠ|longarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:longarĂŠshĂŠ|longarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:longarĂŠkĂŠ|longarĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:longarathatha|longarathatha]] || [[word:longarajaja|longarajaja]] || [[word:longarashasha|longarashasha]] || [[word:longarakaka|longarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:longaratha|longaratha]] || [[word:longaraja|longaraja]] || [[word:longarasha|longarasha]] || [[word:longaraka|longaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:longarafthaf|longarafthaf]] || [[word:longarafjaf|longarafjaf]] || [[word:longarafshaf|longarafshaf]] || [[word:longarafkaf|longarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:longarasha|longarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:longarshĂ«sha|longarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longarosha|longarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longarmusha|longarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:longaryasha|longaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongarnkshĂ«sha|golongarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongarnkrosha|golongarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongarnkmusha|golongarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongarnkyasha|golongarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:longangarasha|longangarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:longangarshĂ«sha|longangarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longangarosha|longangarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longangarmusha|longangarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:longangaryasha|longangaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongangarnkshĂ«sha|golongangarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongangarnkrosha|golongangarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongangarnkmusha|golongangarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongangarnkyasha|golongangarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lengĂŠrasha|lengĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lengĂŠrshĂ«sha|lengĂŠrshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lengĂŠrosha|lengĂŠrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lengĂŠrmusha|lengĂŠrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lengĂŠryasha|lengĂŠryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golengĂŠrnkshĂ«sha|golengĂŠrnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golengĂŠrnkrosha|golengĂŠrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golengĂŠrnkmusha|golengĂŠrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golengĂŠrnkyasha|golengĂŠrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:longfarasha|longfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:longfarshĂ«sha|longfarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longfarosha|longfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longfarmusha|longfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:longfaryasha|longfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongfarnkshĂ«sha|golongfarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongfarnkrosha|golongfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongfarnkmusha|golongfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongfarnkyasha|golongfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
